Video.summary: A West Point graduate has trouble adjusting to an Army unit in the West.
Video.title: Lieutenant Bungle

Video.summary: Stagecoach driver Abe Williamson hunts down two outlaws who robbed his stagecoach.
Video.title: The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon

Image.alt: The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon

Video.summary: Reuel Gridley pays off a bet by donating a bag of flour to a fund for the Civil War wounded.
Video.title: The $275,000 Sack of Flour

Video.summary: A princess agrees to be treated by a medical pioneer who uses a new method: blood transfusion.
Video.title: Bloodline

Video.summary: A woman falls in love with a man she was planning to rob.
Video.title: The Vintage Years

Video.summary: Plagued by gold thefts, Denver bankers set up their own mint in the bank basement.
Video.title: The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.

Image.alt: The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.
The Private Mint of Clark, Gruber and Co.

Video.summary: Attorney William E. Borah defends a woman charged with murder in Nampa, Idaho.
Video.title: The Lion of Idaho

Video.summary: An outlaw and teamster help miners.
Video.title: The Debt

Video.summary: Crew chief Yank Van Duzen walks off a mining job in protest when the foremen ignore warnings.
Video.title: Grotto of Death

Video.summary: Johnny Ringo is an expert gunslinger with a mysterious past; his arrival in town brings concern.
Video.title: The Melancholy Gun

Video.summary: An inventor without enough animals to drive his wagon decides to build a sail to do the job.
Video.title: Thar She Blows

Video.summary: Hunting a large, mysterious creature.
Video.title: The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek

Image.alt: The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek

Video.summary: Winfield Stratton finds gold just after selling his mining claim to a syndicate.
Video.title: Sixty-Seven Miles of Gold

Video.summary: Pearl Hart emigrates from Canada to commit the last stagecoach robbery in history.
Video.title: The Last Stagecoach Robbery

Video.summary: Stephen Austin travels with his companion Valdez to purchase land in the Mexican territory of Texas.
Video.title: A Book of Spanish Grammar

Video.summary: When Doc Holliday shoots a man who cheated him at cards, he becomes a target himself.
Video.title: The Quiet and the Fury

Video.summary: Officials rush to send word to a bride that an escaped criminal wants to stop her wedding.
Video.title: Fort Bowie: Urgent

Video.summary: A 15-year-old joins the Texas revolutionaries to avenge Davy Crockett's death at the Alamo.
Video.title: Davy's Friend

Video.summary: An Indian girl must save a treaty.
Video.title: The Other White Man

Video.summary: A kindhearted saloon singer nurses a gunfighter back to health.
Video.title: The Left Hand Is Damned

Video.summary: A bear hunter and his daughters nurse an injured Easterner back to health.
Video.title: Peter the Hunter

Video.summary: Native brothers must find a tribal renegade.
Video.title: Death in the Desert

Video.summary: Ronald Reagan plays a sheriff who tries enforcing the law without a gun.
Video.title: No Gun Behind His Badge

Video.summary: A minister's attempts to rebuild a church in Carson City are blocked by a saloon owner.
Video.title: Fighting Sky Pilot

Video.summary: Angered by increasing federal mining taxes, the citizens vote to secede from the U.S.
Video.title: Birthright

Video.summary: Newspaper editor Carolyn Romney launches a campaign against outlaws terrorizing Durango, Colorado.
Video.title: Mrs. Romney and the Outlaws

Video.summary: Everyone's deserting wagon master Ezra Meeker - except his wife and an accused murderer.
Video.title: Devil's Gate

Video.summary: The story of a bank clerk who became a heavyweight boxing champion.
Video.title: The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot

Image.alt: The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot
The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot
The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot
The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot
The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot
The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot
The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot
The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot
The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot

Video.summary: A society woman takes over a wagon train when the wagon master is killed in a raid.
Video.title: Lady of the Plains

Video.summary: A prospector helps a dentist who has been beaten and robbed by bandits.
Video.title: The Solid Gold Cavity

Video.summary: Ignoring his brother's warnings, young Roy Bean gets involved in a rivalry over a pretty girl.
Video.title: Sense of Justice

Video.summary: Billy the Kid sets out to avenge the death of friend John Tunstall.
Video.title: The Kid From Hell's Kitchen

Video.summary: While serving as scouts, Carson and Godey come across a man who lost everything in a Native raid.
Video.title: Samaritans, Mountain Style

Video.summary: The skeletons of two prospectors give Ed Schieffelin a clue to the location of a silver mine.
Video.title: Silver Tombstone

Video.summary: Warren takes an unreasonable dislike to his stepmother after returning to his father's ranch.
Video.title: Siege at Amelia's Kitchen

Video.summary: In Apache country, a missionary engages in a philosophic battle with an escaped murderer.
Video.title: A Man Called Abraham

Video.summary: A recruit and his pet mule are the only hope for a besieged cavalry patrol.
Video.title: Honor the Name Dennis Driscoll

Video.summary: After her father is jailed for contempt of court, Kate Melville takes over his job as sheriff.
Video.title: Kate Melville and the Law

Video.summary: A young Chinese man uses his ancient book to help a miner win money at roulette.
Video.title: The Book

Video.summary: Judge Roy Bean names his town after a British actress who he loves but has never met.
Video.title: A Picture of a Lady

Video.summary: A cowboy becomes an expert baker while competing for the daughter of a rancher.
Video.title: Crullers at Sundown!

Video.summary: A four-dollar lawsuit is brought against an insurance company by a farmer who claims he was cheated.
Video.title: The Four-Dollar Law Suit
